feature: View settings opens a right-side panel
last_worker_summary: The fix replaces the broken `toHaveValue('Never')` (which targeted the React Select's hidden dummy `<input value="">`) with two text-visibility checks: one for the label `'Hide done work items after:'` and one for the displayed option `'Never'` — both rendered as visible text nodes in the sidebar's single-value span, which Playwright can reliably find with `getByText`.
